channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.description:

item.title: China poised to trim growth ambitions, pursue timid rebalancing efforts
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
China's National People's Congress begins on March 5 with Beijing expected to set 2026 growth at 4.5–5%.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), parliament(+2), court(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Electoral delineation a key step to restoring parity
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today

item.title: India’s Sindhu withdraws from All England Open after Dubai ordeal
item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)
PV Sindhu was stranded at Dubai airport on her way to the All England Open as global air travel was disrupted since Sunday after the US and Israel attacked Iran.

item.title: Syed Saddiq still the face of Muda, say analysts

item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: China’s consumers scout lower prices, secondhand goods as spending sputters
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
A longstanding taboo in Chinese culture against used goods is lifting rapidly amid stagnating wages, youth unemployment and a years-long property crisis.
Matched: breaking(+3), law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Does Ticketmaster have a stranglehold on concert ticketing — or is it just ‘bringing joy’?
item.description:
Source: The Verge
In a downtown Manhattan courtroom on Monday, lawyers for the US Justice Department and 40 state and district attorneys general warned a jury that the concert industry was being squeezed by a monopolist: Live Nation-Tickemaster. After amassing dominance over ticketing and artists' use of large amphitheaters, lead DOJ counsel David Dahlquist alleged, Live Nation constructed […]
Matched: policy(+3), law(+3), court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.description:

item.description:
Source: FMT Sports (Sports)

item.title: Airline, travel industries scramble with fallout from Middle East conflict

item.title: Pentagon identifies first US soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The four served in the 103rd Sustainment Command from Des Moines, Iowa, part of the army's global logistics and supply operation and were killed in a drone strike on US military facility in Kuwait.

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A government doctor says FMS gazettement trainees juggle medical officer duties, clinics, and administrative work during a six-month training period. This appears specific to Family Medicine, as other specialties do not routinely undertake MO duties during gazettement. The post Medical Officer Duties, Service Load Strain FMS Gazettement Training — Government Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: MACC looking for Rafizi’s ex-aide
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Chai Jin Shern, also known as James Chai, was special functions officer to Rafizi Ramli when the Pandan MP was economy minister.
Matched: corruption(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Reform must go beyond post-audit fixes, says think tank
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Institute for Democracy and Economic Affairs says preventive governance is needed to stop recurring lapses flagged in the latest auditor-general’s report.
Matched: parliament(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: PKR assemblyman Fahmi appeals to top leadership over suspension
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
GEORGE TOWN: Embattled PKR assemblyman Fahmi Zainol has appealed to the party's top leadership to withdraw his suspension, warning that acting on unproven court charges could set a damaging precedent for the party's future. Read full story
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: PM Anwar withdraws appeal over bid to refer eight questions of law to the Federal Court
item.description:
Source: The Star Nation (Malaysia)
PUTRAJAYA: Prime Minister Datuk Seri Anwar Ibrahim has withdrawn his appeal over the High Court's decision that dismissed his attempt to refer eight questions of law to the Federal Court linked to a lawsuit filed by Muhammed Yusoff Rawther. Read full story
Matched: law(+3), court(+2), war(+3)

item.title: Trump’s commerce chief agrees to testify in congressional Epstein probe

item.description:

item.title: Moderna agrees to pay up to $2.87 billion to settle Covid-19 vaccine patent dispute
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Under the deal, Moderna will pay US$950 million (S$1.21 billion) upfront in July 2026.
Matched: ai(+3), vaccine(+3), covid(+2)

item.title: Tunisia jails tycoon Mabrouk for corruption, former PM for handling of case
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TUNIS, March 3 - A Tunisian court on Tuesday jailed the country's richest businessman, Marouan Mabrouk, for corruption while giving prison terms to a former prime minister and several other former cabinet members for their handling of the case.
Matched: corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Travellers stranded, airlines under pressure as Iran war escalates
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Thousands are stranded as major Gulf hubs, including Dubai, remain closed or severely restricted for a fourth day.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: What Trump’s war on Iran means for the US energy crunch
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Fuel prices surged after the Trump administration launched strikes against Iran on Saturday, immediately raising questions about whether the war would increase energy costs for Americans, put more pressure on power grids, and push companies to pump out more oil and gas in the US. If conflict drags on, that could potentially play into Donald […]
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Oman renews push for diplomacy, says ‘off-ramps available’ in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Oman had been mediating talks between Iran and the US before Washington attacked Tehran.
Matched: war(+3), ceasefire(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Travel stocks wipe out RM88.7b after Middle East war grounds flights worldwide
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail Money (Finance)
LONDON, March 3 — Travel shares tumbled yesterday, shedding US$22.6 billion (RM88.7 billion) as escalating conflic...
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), covid(+2)

item.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: The best AirPods deals you can get right now
item.description:
Source: The Verge
If you know where to look, you can often score deals on Apple’s ever-expanding AirPods lineup. Both the AirPods Max and AirPods 4 (with and without ANC) now consistently receive discounts, as do the newer AirPods Pro 3. And while more recent shopping events like Black Friday and Cyber Monday delivered some of the steepest […]
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Dentist Chair Test Could Detect Hidden Diabetes
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)

item.title: Trump's national security team pushes war on Iran in Congress
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - U.S. President Donald Trump's top national security advisers spent much of the day on Tuesday making the case to Congress for the U.S.-Israel war on Iran, describing a rapidly evolving operation and leaving open the possibility of sending in American troops, Democrats and Trump's fellow Republicans said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)

item.title: Anker’s last-gen sleep buds are nearly 40 percent off ahead of daylight saving time
item.description:
Source: The Verge

Good news: if you have trouble falling (or staying asleep), Newegg is currently selling Anker’s Soundcore Sleep A20 earbuds for $113.99 ($66 off) when you use coupon code MMSF88 at checkout, which drops them to just $6 shy of their lowest […]

Source: TechCrunch

item.title: Merz says he urged Trump to increase pressure on Putin

item.title: Hacked traffic cams and hijacked TVs: How cyber operations supported the war against Iran
item.description:

item.title: Doctors With Chronic Pain Learn What Pain Care Truly Means
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
After becoming pain patients themselves, these physicians say they faced a system built to treat anatomy, not suffering. The lessons were humbling — and transformative. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Alopecia Areata May Raise Risk for Autoimmune Diseases
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Patients with new-onset alopecia areata are at increased 10-year risk of developing several immune-mediated inflammatory diseases, according to a study. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Changes in Body Image and Pain Tied to Depression in Cushing
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
A recent longitudinal cohort study shows a statistically significant relationship between body image disturbance, pain, and persistent depression in patients with Cushing syndrome. Medscape News UK
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: CKM Syndrome Recognition and Collaboration Gaining Traction
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)

item.title: Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Nursing is more than bedside care; it is scientific, research-driven, and adaptive. Space nursing demonstrates how far nurses can extend their expertise, reaching environments once thought unreachable. The post Space Nursing: A New Frontier In Health Care — Mohd Irwan Hakeem Mohd Arif appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Autism Experts Strike a Committee to Counter Federal Panel
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Autism scientists and other experts have launched an independent advisory committee to respond to what it describes as a non-evidence-based narrative from a long-standing federal government panel. Medscape Medical News
